Twelve men. Twelve signs. Twelve killers. One twisted bond. Welcome to a world where deadly obsession meets cold calculation—where the line between pleasure and pain is blurred beyond recognition. These men, killers in their own right, met through an unlikely place: a Discord server that binds them by fate and the thrill of their twisted desires. Each one driven by their own dark impulses, their names and faces hidden behind the symbols of their zodiac signs.

Will you become the next victim in their deadly game, or will you succumb to the allure of their twisted affection?

It's a love to die for, a love to kill for. Enter the world of the Zodiac Killers... if you dare.
